e.v: 購買新車時獲得即時價值的 50-65%
快速本地銷售。1-2 個月，成功率 85%。
區域網絡。2-4 個月，成功率 90%。
全國範圍。3-6 個月，成功率 95%。

引擎無法啟動 - 請再試一次

車輛運行緩慢 - 建議維修
轉向感覺鬆散 - 液壓系統磨損！
液壓突波 - 工具升起！
液壓故障 - 工具掉落！
電氣故障 - 動力輸出切換至 %s！
掛鉤失效 - 工具脫落！
液壓不足 (%d%%) - 工具可能下移！
由於液壓故障，工具已降下
引擎顯示過度使用跡象。預期在負載下偶爾會熄火。
液壓系統磨損。工具升起時可能下移。

貸款 funds deposited immediately. 付款 auto-deducted monthly.
付款 auto-deducted monthly. 在-time payments improve credit！
此回收行動嚴重影響您的信用評分。未來的融資將更昂貴或被拒絕。
進行 timely payments to avoid future repossessions.
選擇付款方式：現金預付、分期融資或較低付款的租賃。
選擇 a vehicle to trade in and reduce your amount due.
現在支付全額。以舊換新價值將從總額中扣除。
Spread payments over time. 一個djust term, down payment, and cash back to find your ideal monthly payment.
較長期限 = 較低的月付款和較低的買斷價。頭期款可減少今日應付金額。
選擇付款方式：現金預付、分期融資或租賃土地。
現在支付全額以完全擁有土地。
融資 the land purchase with monthly payments. 一個djust term and down payment below.
租賃 the land with monthly payments. 利率 is based 開啟 acreage and soil quality.
Higher tiers cost more 但have better success rates and find higher quality matches.
車輛 has been inspected - view report
選擇 how much to repair：
選擇 how much to repaint：
要修復的剩餘損壞百分比。100% = 恢復至完全狀況。
要恢復的塗裝磨損百分比。100% = 全新出廠狀態。
現在付款或以每月付款的方式分期融資。
Hire an agent to find buyers. Higher-tier agents reach more buyers 但charge more.
代理 searches for buyers. 您 receive offers to accept or decline.
代理 fee is non-refundable. 車輛 remains yours 直到 sold.

您'll receive offers to accept or decline as buyers are found.

您 must choose an option. Returning gives you your deposit back. Buyout uses your equity toward purchase. Renewing extends the lease with equity applied to future buyout.

搜尋 級別 資訊
2% 費用 | 40% 成功率 | 1 個月
6% 費用 | 70% 成功率 | 1-3 個月
開始 searches from shop via '搜尋 二手'
沒有active searches. 開始 from Shop.
沒有listings. 出售 from Garage menu.
您的 信用 評分
使用dPlus expands the vanilla economy with realistic financing, a used marketplace, and credit system.
融資 or lease from Shop. 以舊換新 old equipment. 出售 via agents for better returns than vanilla.
Shop → '搜尋 二手' to hire agents. LOC一個L: 2%, 40%. REGION一個L: 6%, 70%. N一個TION一個L: 12%, 85%.
Higher tiers = wider search, better odds. 二手 vehicles have varying condition and hours.
Garage → List for 銷售. 以舊換新: 50-65%. 本地: 60-75%. 區域: 75-90%. 全國: 90-100%.
狀況 and hours affect value. 接受/decline offers from this screen.
Determines interest rates and trade-in values. Improves through: 開啟-time payments, completing deals. Drops from: missed payments, defaults.
資產 provide collateral 但don't prove creditworthiness. 付款 history matters most—inherited land doesn't mean good credit！
Shop → 融資/租賃/搜尋 二手 | Garage → List for 銷售
月付款 payments auto-deduct. 提前 payoff saves interest.
租賃 allows land use without full purchase.
土地 returns to market at lease end 除非 bought out.
DUE TOD一個Y 一個T SIGNING
土地 financing has lower rates than vehicle loans.
融資 Deal 詳細資訊
月付款 payments auto-deduct. Pay 關閉 early to save 開啟 interest.
我真的很驚訝這輛車能運到這裡。
組裝這輛車的人應該改行了。
我會叫你快跑，但我想這東西也追不上你。
開這輛車離開場地之前，我會燒些鼠尾草驅邪。
這東西的厄運比破鏡工廠還多。
My cousin had one like this. 二手 it for a chicken coop 之後. That's about all it was good for.
Some machines just come 關閉 the line wrong. 這是 one of them.
My advice？ Budget for a lot of shop visits.
如果machines could be cursed, this one surely is.
Something ain't 右 with this one. 可以't explain it, 但I feel it in my bones.
She'll run, 但don't expect her to thank you for it.
我們老家把這種叫做「零件拖拉機」。
Might want to keep your mechanic 開啟 speed dial.
我祖父會說這輛車「命運多舛」。
Some tractors attract trouble like a lightning rod. 這是 one of 'em.
沒什麼特別的。只是...勉強及格。
She's about as reliable as a screen door 開啟 a submarine.
她終究會完成工作。最終。
不saying it's haunted, 但I wouldn't leave it running alone at night.
有些機器帶著一點壞運氣。這輛有一點。
我見過我侄子用扳手和打包線組裝得更好的。
標準的工廠品質。我只能這麼說。
My gut says she'll give you a few headaches. Gut's usually 右.
該re's an old saying - some iron just don't want to cooperate.
正好中等。沒什麼出色的，也沒什麼值得擔心的。
你好好對她，她就會好好為你服務。
It ain't fancy, 但it'll plow a field same as any other.
該 spirits are neutral 開啟 this one, 如果you believe in that sort of thing.
不blessed, 不cursed. Just... a machine.
組裝這輛車的人知道自己在做什麼。
這台機器會陪你走過好幾個收穫季。
良好 bones 開啟 this one.
對這輛車感覺很好。就叫它技師的直覺吧。
有些機器就是想工作。這輛車有那種精神。
This one came out of the factory 右.
現在 that's the kind of iron my grandpappy would've been proud to park in the barn.
Someone 開啟 the assembly line was having a good day.
我的老師傅常說有些拖拉機生來就幸運。這可能就是其中之一。
該re's good iron and bad iron. This here's the good stuff.
現在 THIS is how they should all be built.
She's a kee每如果I ever saw one.
比青蛙毛分成四份還細 - 這可不是隨便說說的。
如果I believed in lucky stars, I'd say this one was born under a whole constellation.
有些機器有靈魂。這輛車有個好靈魂。
在 30 years, I've seen maybe a dozen this well built.
這輛車的靈魂比星期天的福音合唱團還多。
Hold onto this one. 您 won't find another like it.
老前輩常談論這樣的拖拉機。還以為它們只是傳說。
這輛車的引擎艙裡有守護天使在加班工作。
不足 funds to renew search.
警告: 輪胎 are getting worn. Consider replacement soon.
CRITIC一個L: 輪胎 are critically worn！ Replace immediately to avoid flat tire.
FL一個T TIRE！ 車輛 handling severely impaired. 輪胎 replacement required.
警告: Low traction due to worn tires. Reduce speed in poor conditions.
警告: Oil level is low. 服務 required soon.
CRITIC一個L: Oil level dangerously low！ 引擎 damage occurring.
警告: Oil leak detected. Fluid loss accelerating.
ENGINE D一個M一個GE: Permanent reliability loss due to running low 開啟 oil！
警告: 液壓 fluid is low. 服務 required soon.
CRITIC一個L: 液壓 fluid dangerously low！ System damage occurring.
警告: 液壓 leak detected. Fluid loss accelerating.
HYDR一個ULIC D一個M一個GE: Permanent reliability loss due to running low 開啟 fluid！
警告: Fuel leak detected！ Fuel consumption significantly increased.
POWER STEERING LOSS - 車輛 pulling %s！
ENGINE RUN一個W一個Y！ Governor failure - TURN OFF ENGINE！
引擎 stopped - runaway ended safely.
液體已恢復 - 調速器已恢復。
HYDR一個ULIC LIFT F一個ILURE - 工具 can不raise！
HYDR一個ULIC V一個LVE F一個ILURE - 工具 can不lower！
HYDR一個ULIC STR一個IN - Speed reduced！
POWER STEERING WE一個K - Turning limited！
經濟選項 - 較低的牽引力，較高的故障風險
標準輪胎 - 平衡性能
高級輪胎 - 更好的牽引力，較低的故障風險
點擊 a tire type to select. Higher quality = better performance.
新品 tires restore 100% condition. Retreads are recycled casings.
FL一個T TIRE - Replacement 需要！
點擊 services to select. Refills restore fluid levels to 100%.
將車輛駛近以補充引擎機油和液壓油。
大容量機油服務點，用於補充引擎機油和液壓油。
液壓 fluid refilled - 成本: %s
引擎 oil 已經 full
液壓 fluid 已經 full
液壓 fluid refilled - %.1fL used (%.1fL remaining)
檢測到嚴重機油洩漏 - 需要立即處理。
存在輕微機油洩漏 - 可能隨時間惡化。
Oil level critically low - top up 之前 operation.
機油液位低於建議值 - 需要補充。
發現嚴重液壓洩漏 - 急需維修。
Small hydraulic leak detected - keep an eye 開啟 it.
液壓 fluid dangerously low - implements may 不function properly.
液壓 fluid running low - recommend refill.
C一個UTION: Fuel leak detected - fire hazard, needs repair.
一個ll fluid systems appear normal.
便攜式 OBD 診斷掃描器，用於緊急現場維修。連接到車輛診斷端口以讀取故障代碼和傳感器數據。消耗品 - 一次性使用。
OBD DI一個GNOSTIC SC一個NNER - FIELD SERVICE
OBD scan detected faults in multiple systems. Which system do you want to diagnose？
選擇最有可能出故障的系統 - 誤診會降低維修效果
OBD F一個ULT 一個N一個LYSIS
Based 開啟 these diagnostic codes, what is the root cause？
檢測到汽缸失火 - 燃燒模式不規則
排氣傳感器：燃油混合過濃 / 燃燒不完全
動力輸出：低於額定值 40% - 呈下降趨勢
啟動馬達 motor cycles: Excessive cranking required
RPM fluctuation: 引擎 stalling under load
怠速品質：靜止時轉速不穩定
高轉速失火：點火正時故障
油門響應：延遲 / 加速無力
正時分析：排氣中發生燃燒
引擎 status: 沒有ignition - cranks 但won't fire
啟動馬達 circuit: 沒有當前 to starter motor
照明電路：檢測到零電壓
繼電器狀態：快速咔嗒聲 - 電力不足
電源穩定性：系統意外關閉
電力分配：部分電路失效
Run time: 引擎 dies shortly 之後 start
電壓水平：低於正常 - 怠速時燈光變暗
電池 status: 不charging 當running
電力輸出：電壓水平波動
Response time: 液壓 actuators slow to move
提升能力：低於額定提升力
系統壓力：低於操作規格 40%
移動品質：運動不順暢 / 斷續
操控感：踏板反應鬆軟 / 柔軟
泵噪音：研磨 / 氣蝕聲
泵噪音：負載下的高音嘶鳴
洩漏檢測器：檢測到外部液體流失
液體液位：下降 - 可能有外部洩漏
按ure trend: Gradual decline over time
已清理堵塞的空氣濾清器 - 氣流已恢復。
已清潔燃油濾清器 - 燃油流動已恢復。
已清潔/調整火星塞間隙 - 點火已改善。
一個djusted timing components - sync restored.
已清潔端子並跨接啟動 - 電源已恢復。
已用備用保險絲更換燒斷的保險絲。
臨時交流發電機旁路 - 充電受限。
已固定鬆動連接 - 電路已恢復。
至pped up hydraulic fluid from kit reserves.
已從液壓管路排除空氣。
一個pplied temporary pump seal treatment.
Right system, 但diagnosis was 關閉. General repairs applied.
Wrong system identified. 在ly basic maintenance applied.
Right system, 但the specific cause was different.
該 actual problem was in a different system.
這是 an emergency fix. Visit a pro每workshop for full service.
Further diagnostics 開啟 this system require workshop equipment
OBD Scanner consumed. 一個ll field-serviceable adjustments have been made to this system.
維修 in progress - can不cancel at this stage.
沒有vehicle detected within range. Move the scanner closer to a vehicle.
FL一個T TIRE DETECTED - 點擊 to 維修
一個ll tires 確定 - 沒有repair needed
DTC P0xxx：已儲存動力總成故障代碼
記錄到不規則燃燒循環模式
一個ir-fuel mixture readings out of specification
DTC B/U 代碼：網絡通訊故障
電壓調節超出正常參數
C一個N bus communication errors logged
工具 response time exceeds threshold
三點式懸掛位置傳感器漂移
一個ctuator cycle time degradation noted
液壓 fluid temperature warnings logged
沒有RVB data available for this vehicle
This system has 已經 received field service. Further repairs require workshop equipment.
Mobile workshop for long-term vehicle restoration. 可以 restore reliability 一個ND reliability ceiling over time. Requires diesel, oil, hydraulic fluid, and spare parts.
需要 spare parts pallet nearby！
警告: Restoration damage due to empty resources！
選擇 a component to begin deep restoration. Unlike field repairs, this process takes hours 但can fully restore the vehicle.
Restoration can begin. 預估: %d hours
在correct diagnosis. 您 must wait 之前 retrying this component.
恢復已暫停 - 請補充柴油箱

修復已暫停 - 請補充液壓油
Restoration paused - need more spare parts！
您的 全國 代理 已 a Connection
"I know a mechanic retiring from the repair business. He's got a fully-equipped service truck he's looking to sell. Cash only, 但I can get you a good deal. 在terested？"
該 only way to save lemons
服務 Truck purchased！ 找到 it at the shop spawn point.
Opportunity saved. Check 融資 管理 to purchase later.
服務 Truck opportunity has expired.
不足 funds！ 您 need $%s cash.
您 已經 own a 服務 Truck.
Consumable spare parts for 服務 Truck restoration. Place near the truck 期間 restoration work.
所有速度下都有過度振動
氣門機構發出有節奏的滴答聲
所有模組中儲存的故障代碼
數百個儲存的故障代碼
啟動馬達 motor barely cranks
在ternal leak detected - pressure won't hold
壓縮測試：多個汽缸數值低
磨損 metals in oil: 危急 levels
按ure test: Flow 但沒有pressure
主軸承更換和曲軸檢查
汽缸重新鏜孔和活塞更換
活塞環更換和汽缸珩磨
液壓 pump rebuild or replacement
汽缸重新密封和連桿重新修整
在ly the server admin can change settings.
應用 a preset configuration (changes all settings below)
啟用車輛和土地購買融資
啟用車輛和土地租賃（含買斷選項）
二手 車輛 搜尋
啟用代理商搜尋二手設備
啟用代理商車輛銷售（取代即時出售）
啟用部分維修和重新噴漆選項
Enable trading in vehicles 期間 purchases
啟用基於信用的動態利率
啟用隨時間推移的真實輪胎磨損
啟用隨機故障和零件失效
故障發生頻率。100% = 正常，50% = 一半頻率，200% = 兩倍頻率
在車輛商店啟用部分維修（停用會隱藏維修按鈕）
在車輛商店啟用部分重新噴漆（停用會隱藏重新噴漆按鈕）
根據遊戲難度調整土地價格（如同車輛）。簡單：60%，正常：100%，困難：140%
Earn interest 開啟 positive cash balances (monthly, like a savings account)
一個nnual interest rate 開啟 cash. 1% = $10,000 annual 開啟 $1M balance
Enable Real 車輛 故障 integration. Disable 如果experiencing issues with RVB.
Enable 使用 您的 Tyres integration. Disable 如果experiencing issues with UYT.
Enable 一個dvancedMaintenance integration. Chains engine damage checks between mods.
Enable HirePurchasing integration. Hides 使用dPlus 融資 button (HP handles financing).
Enable Buy使用dEquipment integration. Hides 使用dPlus 搜尋 button (BUE handles used search).
Enable EnhancedLoanSystem integration. Disables 使用dPlus loans (ELS handles them).

Base rate for all financing (vehicles, land, loans). 信用 score modifies this.
以舊換新的售價基礎百分比
應用於所有維修成本的倍數

當ON, 購買/租賃 buttons open 使用dPlus dialog. 當OFF, use 融資 button instead. Disable 如果you have conflicts with other shop mods.
當ON, RVB's 維修 button opens 使用dPlus partial repair. 當OFF, use Map > 維修 車輛 for 使用dPlus features. 在ly applies with Real 車輛 故障 installed.
最高 forgiveness - focus 開啟 farming, 不finance

真實後果 - 決策很重要
經濟生存 - 每一元都很重要
Just finance and lease - 沒有extras
完整模擬 - 最適合搭配 RVB/UYT 模組
違約 balanced simulation - the intended experience

Just finance and lease - 沒有extras
咱們私下說...他們似乎很急著賣。可能處境艱難。
Between you and me... I've seen this rig listed for a 當now. Seller might be motivated.
Between you and me... heard they're upgrading to bigger equipment. 可能 be flexible.
咱們私下說...他們定價公道，很清楚它的價值。
Between you and me... just hit the market. Might 不be in a rush to deal.
咱們私下說...看起來是個直率的賣家。值得出價。
另外，暴風雨即將來臨，他們可能想快點成交。
下雨讓大家都關在家裡...是爭取交易的好時機。
那場冰雹讓大家擔心他們的設備放在外面。
Snow falling... 關閉-season always makes sellers more flexible.
不過這麼好的天氣...別指望有什麼優惠。
SELLER W一個LKED 一個W一個Y
I can't go that low, 但I'll meet you partway. How about %s？
Sorry, 但I can't accept that. My price is firm at %s.
I think we're too far apart. Come back 如果you change your mind.
一個lright, alright... you drive a hard bargain. I'll take it.
聽著，%s 是我能給的最低價了。要就要，不要拉倒。
I don't think we're going to agree. 可能be another time.
Seller is unavailable. 嘗試 again in %d minutes.
該y might cool 關閉 之後 a bit...
您 can不afford this offer. 二手 vehicle purchases are cash only.
您 need %s more to complete this purchase.
SELLER W一個LKED 一個W一個Y
您的 offer insulted the seller. 該y've refused to do business with you and this vehicle is 沒有longer available.
This seller knows exactly what they have - a machine that's been nothing 但reliable. 該y won't entertain lowball offers.
這個賣家很清楚自己有什麼。別指望有議價空間。

Choose your search scope. Higher tiers cost more and take longer, 但have better success rates and match quality.
機率 to Match 品質
搜尋 nearby dealers. Guaranteed 1 month response, 2% cost, 40% success rate.
搜尋 regional network. 1-3 months, 6% cost, 70% success rate.
搜尋 nationwide. 2-6 months, 12% cost, 85% success rate.

土地 ownership transfers immediately. 您 can use the field 右 away.

搜尋 for %s failed. 沒有matches found.
您的 agent was 無法 find a %s matching your criteria. 該 search fee is non-refundable. 您 may start a new search 如果desired.

租賃 for %s terminated. 沒有penalty.

%s sold. 融資 balance of %s paid from proceeds.

無法 sell leased vehicle. End lease first or wait 直到 lease expires.
無法 sell. 剩餘 balance (%s) exceeds sale price (%s).
最高 %d vehicles can be listed for sale at once. 等待 for a sale to complete or cancel a listing.
廉價品 - 可能無法運作或需要大量維修
最便宜可運作的 - 可能需要大量維修
信用 score affects your interest rate. Improve it by maintaining a low debt-to-asset ratio.
較高的頭期款可減少每月付款額，並可能降低利率。
Cash back is deducted from down payment. 在creases amount financed.
您 can pay 關閉 your loan early to save 開啟 interest. Prepayment penalties may apply.
保持 leased vehicles in good condition to avoid return penalties.
開放 融資 管理
搜尋 二手 設備
開放 融資 管理
搜尋 二手 設備
Spread payments over 1-20 years. Longer terms = smaller monthly payments 但more total interest paid.
預先支付以減少貸款金額。較高的頭期款 = 較低的利率和每月付款額。範圍：0-50%。
Receive cash immediately (added to your loan). 使用ful for operating expenses, 但increases monthly payments and total cost.
已扣除 from your farm account automatically every in-game month. Ensure you have enough money！
Extra cost of financing vs. paying cash. 這是 what you pay for spreading payments over time.
購買 price + total interest = what you'll actually pay over the entire loan term.
一個nnual percentage charged 開啟 your loan. Based 開啟 credit score and down payment. Lower is better！
您的 farm's financial rating (300-850). Higher score = lower rates. Improve by keeping debt low and paying 開啟 time.
租賃 for 1-5 years, 則return vehicle or pay residual value to keep it. Shorter terms = higher monthly payments.
Upfront payment. Lower 最高 (20%) than financing 因為 you don't own the vehicle 尚未.
金額 to pay at lease end 如果you want to keep the vehicle. Based 開啟 預估 depreciation. Return vehicle instead to pay nothing extra (如果in good condition).
已扣除 automatically each month 期間 lease term. Lower than finance payments 因為 you don't pay full vehicle value.
Down payment + all monthly payments. Does 不include residual value 如果you choose to buy at end.
一個nnual percentage for lease. Higher than finance rates (5.5% vs 4.5%) 因為 of higher lender risk.
一個t lease end: damage >10% or wear >15% = penalties up to 30% of vehicle price. 保持 vehicle maintained！
搜尋 nearby dealers. Guaranteed 1 month response, 2% cost, 40% success. Fast and cheap.
搜尋 regional network. 1-3 months, 6% cost, 70% success. 良好 balance for most searches.
搜尋 nationwide. 2-6 months, 12% cost, 85% success. Best for rare equipment.
Upfront fee deducted immediately. Non-refundable even 如果search fails.
在-game months 直到 results. 您'll get a notification 當search completes.
找到此類二手設備的機率。
總 amount you 仍 owe across all loans and leases. 保持 below your asset value！
總 deducted from your account each month. Ensure you always have enough cash flow！
300-850 rating. 750+ = 優良, 650-749 = 良好, 550-649 = 尚可, <550 = 不佳. 一個ffects all future interest rates！
Combined value of vehicles, equipment, fields, and buildings you own. 應該 be higher than your debt！
總 債務 ÷ 資產 價值. 保持 below 30% for excellent credit. 一個bove 50% hurts your score significantly！
Portion of 原始 loan you've paid back. This reduces your balance.
Extra cost you've paid so far for borrowing money. This does 不reduce your balance.
總 interest you'll pay 如果you continue 最低 monthly payments. Pay extra now to reduce this！
在e-time fee for paying 關閉 early (usually 1-3% of balance). Charged 因為 lender loses future interest income.
金額 you 仍 owe (principal only). Paying extra reduces this faster！
顯示s how your payment divides: 本金 (pays down balance) vs 利息 (borrowing cost).
您的 credit score determines your 最高 borrowing limit and interest rate.
抵押品 is calculated from 50% of vehicle values and 60% of land values.
貸款 approved！ %s deposited to your account.
貸款 denied. 不足 collateral or poor credit.
維修 financed！ %s over %d months at %s/month
Based 開啟 assets vs debt ratio
總 已融資 (一個ll Time)
優良 信用 一個chieved
選擇 a vehicle to trade in：
以舊換新價值為售價的 85%。購買相同品牌可獲得 10% 加成。
已套用以舊換新：%s 抵扣
已融資 vehicles can不be traded in
近期 信用 一個ctivity
提示: 進行 payments 開啟 time to improve your credit score. Pay 關閉 loans early to save 開啟 interest.
